title: USAi Harness Project Config
description: Schema for `usai_harness.yaml` files. Per ADR-011 / ADR-012 / ADR-015. Authoritative artifact: `usai_harness/data/project_config.schema.json`. Catalog membership and family-catalog parameter ranges are validated separately at config-load time and are deliberately out of scope here.

model.description: Legacy single-model form. The loader translates this to a one-element pool with the same name as default_model. Mutually exclusive with `models`.

models.description: Pool of models available to this project. Each member is either a bare string (the catalog name) or an object whose `name` is the catalog name and whose other keys are forwarded to the transport unchanged.

default_model.description: Default model name used when a task does not select one. Must be a pool member. Required when `models` has more than one entry; inferred when there is exactly one.

provider.description: Endpoint provider for the pool (e.g. `usai`, `openrouter`). Auto-detected from pool members when omitted; cross-provider pools are rejected at load time.

temperature.description: Project-default temperature. The harness forwards this to the transport unchanged; the family catalog and the provider response are the sources of truth for whether this value is accepted.

system_prompt.description: Project-default system prompt; per-task overrides win when present.

workers.description: Number of async workers pulling from the request queue.

credentials.description: Credential backend selector. Backend-specific kwargs flow through as additional properties.
